issue_description: My account was locked after too many attempts and the password reset email never arrives.
I was charged twice after the checkout page crashed during payment.
Since the latest update the app is slow and reports do not load.
Please cancel my trial renewal because I cannot find the plan settings.
Someone used my account without permission and changed my email address.
Where can I find the export feature for invoices?
The package tracking number is not updating and the shipment is delayed.
My subscription was cancelled and the latest invoice still charged my card.
I want all my personal data deleted from your platform.
The upload button returns an error, but only when I use the free plan.
My bank account was charged, but I cannot access the account dashboard to see the receipt.
The system is not syncing data, and my subscription status also looks wrong.
